name: Michael Jackson
bio: Michael Jackson's catalog remains one of the most commercially durable in pop because global hit density, licensing demand, and multi-generational familiarity keep the songs active.
notable_for: Blockbuster album economics, global pop standards, and one of the strongest legacy catalogs in modern music.
career_highlight: Thriller and Bad-era recordings still operate at elite catalog scale decades after release.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from estate-managed catalog scale, global streaming, publishing value, licensing demand, and long-running physical and compilation revenue.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label and estate-linked catalog economics with estate-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing and writer-side economics remain material across the strongest songs
ownership.catalog_sale_status: Estate-led catalog management and reported catalog transactions can materially change retained economics
ownership.notes: This is an estate-side modeled range, not a disclosed royalty statement.
